productDisplayName: U.S. Polo Assn. Unisex Laptop Black Backpack
description: Talk about style and space rolled into one, and there's no better Sports bag you can find than this one from US Polo. Neatly designed with lots of organiser space and laptop compartment, this bag makes for a great everyday wear to college or office. Made of polyester with a nylon lining for durability, toughness and easy cleaning Branded zippers and sliders for easy use and longer life of the bag One main copiously spaced zippered compartment with padded laptop compartment and two pouch for essentials Zippered compartment with an inner zippered pouch, two other pockets for enhanced space and a mesh zippered pouch Zippered utility pocket on the front with organizing pouches,mobile pouch, pen holders, a mesh zippered pouch and four credit card or id card slots US Polo badge appliqued on the front Synthetic haul loop for handling ease Wide, adjustable handles and padded back for carrying ease and to protect the shoulders and back from injuries Care Hand wash Clean with a damp cloth when necessary Do not dry clean or machine wash, tumble dry, wring or line dryaccessories shown in the image does not come along with the backpack
